hooks.command: cat "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/SYSTEM.md" | head -80; echo '---'; if [ -f "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/CLAUDE.md" ]; then cat "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/CLAUDE.md"; fi
cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && git add -A && git diff --cached --quiet || git commit -m "auto: $(date +%H:%M)" && git push origin main 2>/dev/null || true

hooks.prompt: The user asked Claude to build a complete pipeline. Check: (1) All files written? (2) --dry-run works? (3) Code parses? (4) Output matches schema? If ANY incomplete: {"ok": false, "reason": "what remains"}. If stop_hook_active is true OR all pass: {"ok": true}.
